subject: Scroll of Wall of Force
fact: A consumable token belonging to Felkur produced a Scroll of Wall of Force.
source_quote: A consumable token belonging to Felkur that, when used, produced a Scroll of Wall of Force

subject: demonic barrier creation
fact: The party used the token to create a barrier to block incoming demonic reinforcements from the stairwell.
source_quote: The party used it to create a barrier to block incoming demonic reinforcements from the stairwell

subject: Web spell casting
fact: Veris cast Web as a legendary action.
source_quote: Cast by Veris as a legendary action

subject: Web spell effect
fact: The Web spell conjured a 20-foot cube of sticky, flammable webbing that restrained party members within it.
source_quote: this spell conjured a 20-foot cube of sticky, flammable webbing that restrained party members within it

subject: Web spell combat effect
fact: The Web spell imposed disadvantage on attack rolls for restrained party members.
source_quote: imposed disadvantage on their attack rolls

subject: Web spell combat effect
fact: The Web spell granted advantage to attackers targeting restrained party members.
source_quote: and granted advantage to attackers targeting them

subject: Firebolt targeting Stone Golem
fact: Veris used Firebolt to target the Stone Golem and burn away the webs restraining it.
source_quote: Used by Veris to target the Stone Golem and burn away the webs restraining it

subject: Firebolt legendary action
fact: Veris used Firebolt as a legendary action to deal heavy damage to Akritas.
source_quote: and later used as a legendary action to deal heavy damage to Akritas

subject: Spirit Guardians maintenance
fact: Bramgrim maintained Spirit Guardians as a concentration spell throughout the battle.
source_quote: A concentration spell maintained by Bramgrim throughout the battle

subject: Spirit Guardians damage effect
fact: Spirit Guardians created a protective aura of spirits that damaged the Stone Golem, Shield Guardian, and Mezzoloth as they moved through the area.
source_quote: creating a protective aura of spirits that damaged the Stone Golem, Shield Guardian, and Mezzoloth as they moved through the area

subject: Spirit Guardians speed reduction
fact: Spirit Guardians reduced the Stone Golem's speed on a failed saving throw.
source_quote: and reduced the Stone Golem's speed on a failed saving throw

subject: Freedom of Movement casting
fact: Bramgrim cast Freedom of Movement on himself.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on himself

subject: Freedom of Movement effect
fact: Freedom of Movement allowed Bramgrim to move freely through the magical webs without being restrained.
source_quote: allowing him to move freely through the magical webs without being restrained

subject: Mass Healing Word casting
fact: Bramgrim used Mass Healing Word as a bonus action to restore health to Daein.
source_quote: A bonus action spell used by Bramgrim to restore health to Daein during the heat of battle

subject: Mass Healing Word result
fact: Mass Healing Word returned 17 hit points to Daein.
source_quote: returning 17 hit points

subject: Wall of Force casting
fact: Veris cast Wall of Force to create an invisible, physical barrier to isolate Felkur.
source_quote: Cast by Veris to create an invisible, physical barrier to isolate Felkur

subject: Wall of Force declaration
fact: Veris declared there was no escape after casting Wall of Force.
source_quote: declaring there was no escape

subject: Wall of Force dispelling
fact: Bramgrim successfully dispelled the Wall of Force.
source_quote: It was later successfully dispelled by Bramgrim

subject: Greater Invisibility on Felkur
fact: Greater Invisibility was an active spell on Felkur that allowed him to remain hidden while utilizing his cannon.
source_quote: An active spell on Felkur that allowed him to remain hidden while utilizing his cannon

subject: GM ruling on Felkur
fact: The GM ruled that Felkur could use his cannon and remain invisible.
source_quote: The GM ruled that Felkur could use his cannon and remain invisible

subject: Dispel Magic casting
fact: Bramgrim cast Dispel Magic at fifth level.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim at fifth level

subject: Dispel Magic effect
fact: Dispel Magic automatically shattered Veris's Wall of Force.
source_quote: to automatically shatter Veris's Wall of Force

subject: Dispel Magic result
fact: Dispel Magic freed the party to strike back at the wizard.
source_quote: freeing the party to strike back at the wizard

subject: Hail of Thorns casting
fact: Akritas cast Hail of Thorns as a bonus action at third level.
source_quote: Cast by Akritas as a bonus action at third level

subject: Hail of Thorns effect
fact: Hail of Thorns turned Akritas's arrow into a burst of magical thorns that rained down on Veris.
source_quote: turning her arrow into a burst of magical thorns that rained down on Veris

subject: Veris death
fact: Hail of Thorns ultimately killed Veris before he could unleash a fireball.
source_quote: and ultimately killed him before he could unleash a fireball

subject: Cloudkill casting
fact: The Mezzoloth cast Cloudkill upon entering the battlefield.
source_quote: Cast by the Mezzoloth upon entering the battlefield

subject: Cloudkill effect
fact: Cloudkill conjured a billowing cloud of poisonous gas that forced the party to make Constitution saving throws or take heavy poison damage.
source_quote: conjuring a billowing cloud of poisonous gas that forced the party to make Constitution saving throws or take heavy poison damage

subject: Cloudkill persistence
fact: The Cloudkill cloud persists and threatens the party's concentration spells each round.
source_quote: The cloud persists and threatens the party's concentration spells each round
